SERVICE_DETAIL.TITLE: Building permit
SERVICE_DETAIL.DESC: For example, to purchase a plot of land to build your house, the service requires documenting the sale and purchase transaction at notary offices or through a notary public to register the property in your name.
SERVICE_DETAIL.WHO_EVALUATION: This service has been rated as average

STEPS.1: Log in to the National Single Sign-On Portal via the Balady platform.
STEPS.2: Select Building License Services, then Issue Building License.
STEPS.3: Licensing services, then select the required municipality.
STEPS.4: Choose the engineering office, then enter the building survey issuance number and year, and attach a copy of the deed.
STEPS.5: Submit the request to the specified engineering office, then complete the information and attachments at the office and send it to the municipality.
STEPS.6: Confirm request data, attachments, and approvals by the municipality.
STEPS.7: Request approval and issuance of payment. Pay fees and print the license.

SIDEBAR.TARGET_AUDIENCE_VAL: Citizens, GCC nationals, investors, and foreigners

FEEDBACK.RATING_VAL: This service was rated with an average of 3.9 from 1544 ratings

SERVICE_FORM.TITLE: Text Fields
SERVICE_FORM.DESC: When using forms, standard form fields are text fields usually used for short text input. Form field states include default, active, focused, error, hint, and disabled.
